file_insights.summary: Complete implementation of Django Admin interfaces for Order, Table, and QRCode models with comprehensive customization

patterns_discovered.description: Reusable mixin that filters out soft-deleted records across all admin classes
patterns_discovered.benefit: DRY principle - eliminates duplicate soft-delete filtering logic

patterns_discovered.description: Using format_html to render visual status indicators with dynamic colors
patterns_discovered.benefit: Improved UX with visual status representation

patterns_discovered.description: TableInline, OrderItemInline, QRCodeInline for managing related objects
patterns_discovered.benefit: Allows editing related objects without leaving parent admin page

patterns_discovered.description: Organized information hierarchy with collapse classes for less-frequently accessed data
patterns_discovered.benefit: Reduced cognitive load for common operations

patterns_discovered.description: Admin actions for batch operations like activate/deactivate zones and orders
Using autocomplete_fields for ForeignKey relationships instead of dropdown
Using gettext_lazy for all user-facing strings
patterns_discovered.benefit: Multi-language support baked in from the start

gotchas_discovered.description: Must explicitly filter deleted_at__isnull=True in get_queryset methods to hide soft-deleted records
gotchas_discovered.impact: Without this, deleted records will appear in admin listings

gotchas_discovered.description: Inline classes must override get_queryset independently - parent class filtering doesn't cascade
gotchas_discovered.impact: Soft-deleted related records could appear in inlines if not filtered
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Each inline (TableInline, OrderItemInline, QRCodeInline) implements its own filtering

gotchas_discovered.description: QRCode has on_delete=models.CASCADE for table - deleting table deletes QR codes
gotchas_discovered.impact: Soft deletes may be bypassed by cascade operations
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Should consider using on_delete=models.SET_NULL or implementing custom delete handlers

gotchas_discovered.description: Admin list displays access zone, organization, and table relationships without optimization
gotchas_discovered.impact: N+1 query problem in admin listings
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Should add list_select_related and list_prefetch_related to optimize queries

gotchas_discovered.description: Git diff was truncated at 49844 characters - full implementation not visible
gotchas_discovered.impact: Cannot see complete admin configuration for Order, OrderItem, ServiceRequest models
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Full file should be reviewed to ensure complete implementation

approach_outcome.description: Comprehensive Django Admin interface implementation completed for Order, Table, QRCode, and related models
key_achievements: Implemented 8 admin classes with consistent patterns
Created reusable SoftDeleteAdminMixin to handle soft-delete filtering
Added visual enhancements with color badges and formatted displays
Configured inline admins for related object management
Implemented bulk actions for efficient record management
Proper queryset filtering to hide soft-deleted records

recommendations.recommendation: Add list_select_related and list_prefetch_related to optimize admin queryset
recommendations.rationale: Prevent N+1 queries when displaying foreign key relationships in list view

recommendations.recommendation: Review CASCADE delete behavior for soft-delete models
recommendations.rationale: CASCADE deletes may bypass soft-delete implementation
recommendations.suggestion: Consider using SET_NULL or custom delete handlers for soft-delete models

recommendations.recommendation: Document soft-delete filtering expectations in module docstring
recommendations.rationale: Clarify that soft-deleted records are hidden by default for all models

recommendations.recommendation: Add list_display_links to specify which field navigates to detail view
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation may have unintuitive click targets

recommendations.recommendation: Implement custom list filters for commonly used queries
recommendations.rationale: Django's default filters may not capture business logic effectively
recommendations.example: Custom SimpleListFilter for 'Available Tables', 'Recent Orders', etc.

recommendations.recommendation: Create comprehensive admin tests for soft-delete filtering
recommendations.rationale: Ensure soft-deleted records remain hidden in all scenarios
recommendations.test_coverage: get_queryset filtering, inline filtering, bulk actions

recommendations.recommendation: Add usage documentation for the SoftDeleteAdminMixin
recommendations.rationale: Future developers should know how to extend it
recommendations.suggestion: Include in docstring and admin guide
